zh.lifeSummary: 當Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt於大約1550年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾時，他的父親Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie29歲，母親Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale26歲。他和Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1610年10月14日在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt于大约1550年出生在苏格兰洛-爾时，他的父亲Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie29岁，母亲Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale26岁。他和Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1610年10月14日在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Munro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic Rothach ‘man from Ro’. According to tradition which may be substantially correct, the ancestors of the Munros came from Ireland, from the foot of the river Roe in Derry, whence the name Bun-rotha, giving Mun-rotha by eclipsis of b after the preposition in’. See also Monroe , compare Munroe .
History: This (see 1 above) is the name of a Scottish clan with an ancestral seat at Foulis Castle, near Evanton, Ross-shire.

variants.name: Mulroy
meanings: Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolruaidh ‘descendant of Maolruadh’, a personal name composed of the elements maol ‘chief’ + ruadh ‘red’, i.e. ‘red-haired chieftain’. This surname, from has sometimes been changed to Munroe (see Munro ).

variants.name: Monroe
meanings: History: Scottish bearers of this name are descended from Donald O’Kane, who in the 11th century migrated from the mouth of the Roe to Ferrindonald in Cromarty, Scotland. There his descendants, as barons of Foulis and vassals of the earls of Ross, held lands along the Firth of Cromarty. James Monroe (1758–1831), 5th president of the US (1817–25), came from a cadet branch of this family.

variants.name: Munroe
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Munro  .

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt was born about 1550, in Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie, was 29 and his mother, Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat. He died on 14 October 1610, in Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt est né environ 1550, à Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1610, à Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.Inveran, Ross Cromarty, Scotland: Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt um 1550 in Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie 29 und seine Mutter Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale 26. Er hatte mit Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1610 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt è nato il circa 1550 nel Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat. Morì il 14 ottobre 1610, nel Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assyntが約1550年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconieは29歳，母Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdaleは26歳であった。彼はIsabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbatとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1610年10月14日にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt(이)가 대략 1550년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 10월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt родился около 1550 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat. Он умер 14 октября 1610 г. в местности росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
